knife.tip: The K is silent. Say “nife” with a soft ending — not “nai-fu.”

world.tip: Keep it smooth: one gentle R sound in the middle. Don’t add extra vowels at the end.

think.tip: Put your tongue lightly between your teeth and blow air. It’s a soft “th,” not “sink.”

very.tip: Start with a clear V (top teeth on your bottom lip), then a short “eh,” then a light R.

comfortable.tip: Many people say “COMF-ter-bul.” The middle is shorter than it looks on paper.
